name: OrcaSlicer ARM
description: OrcaSlicer for arm64 SBCs, accessible through a browser.
longDescription:
OrcaSlicer ARM runs OrcaSlicer in a browser-accessible KasmVNC container for Raspberry Pi and other arm64 single-board computers.

The installer includes two memory modes: RAM-only for hosts with enough memory, and an opt-in swapfile mode that creates a 4 GB host swapfile for smaller devices.
